guided.example_consistent: The same lesson runs through every step.
guided.full_lesson_sub: One consistent example — a photosynthesis passage — carried through every Guided step, end to end.
guided.io_verified: Verified against the actual tool behavior in AlloFlow.
guided.recap_empty: Generate resources from the tools, then download your full pack below.
guided.recap_hub: Looking for more? The Learning Hub has StoryForge, PoetTree, and LitLab.
guided.resume_version_skip: This saved tutorial progress is from a newer version and was not restored.
guided.try_example: New here? Try it with an example passage

toolbar.setup_options_aria: Open setup and Guided Mode options
toolbar.setup_options_desc: Restart the setup wizard or turn on Guided Mode for step-by-step lesson building.
toolbar.quickstart_setup_desc: Set grade, source material, standards, languages, and personalization.
toolbar.guided_mode_setup_desc: Highlight one tool at a time and build a resource pack with prompts, examples, and progress checks.
toolbar.guided_mode_resume_desc: Pick the tour back up where you left off.
toolbar.guided_mode_start_over: Start the tour over from step 1
